summary: Introducing Blackmagic Camera ProDock! A new dock that adds professional camera connections to iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max including genlock, external timecode, HDMI out, headphone and microphone inputs, external disk recording and more! Rig your new iPhone for professional cinema production! Only US$295. Learn more at http://bmd.link/yi9Y4p

summary: Blackmagic Media Player 10G Now Available. Unfortunately we have not been able to certify the Thunderbolt connection on the front panel, so it has rear Thunderbolt only. However the price will be reduced by $50 to US$945 excluding duties. Plus all backorders can get this new lower price.

New Blackmagic Cloud Store 1.7.2! Get improved syncing of shared Organizations folders on Blackmagic Cloud, better read and write compatibility of Final Cut Pro libraries and general performance and stability improvements for all models. Download now from http://bmd.link/L79H9y
Blackmagic URSA Cine 17K 65 Added to Netflix Approved Camera List. Shoot 65mm open gate 8K at up to 100fps, or 17K at up to 60fps with 16 stops of dynamic range! Learn more at http://bmd.link/y4o9nJ
USA Price Updates! Due to new tariffs, most of our US prices have increased. Please check our US web site for details. Prices in other countries are currently unchanged. http://bmd.link/cx7oE7

Introducing Blackmagic PYXIS 12K! A new digital film camera that features the same sensor as URSA Cine 12K LF in the compact and easy to rig PYXIS design. Includes a massive 16 stops of dynamic range and with dual CFexpress media recorders. Only US$4,995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/tuyHXN

New DeckLink IP 100G! A PCIe Gen 4 card which can capture and playback up to 8 channels of Ultra HD video simultaneously into 2110 IP systems. Includes 2 x 100G Ethernet ports for redundancy! Learn more at http://bmd.link/iPP7LH

Introducing HyperDeck Shuttle 4K Pro! A new desktop HyperDeck that’s a perfect clip player for live production Includes recording to H.264, H.265, ProRes or DNx files, proxies and built in scopes. The optional M.2 media card means it has network storage built in! From $1,495. Learn more at http://bmd.link/MUT7zT

New Blackmagic 2110 IP UpDownCross 12G! A standards converter for live production and broadcast gives you the highest quality video conversion between all equipment with 2110 IP video, 12G-SDI, and HDMI connections! Only US$545! Learn more at http://bmd.link/WoN3F9

New Blackmagic PYXIS Accessories! Blackmagic PYXIS Pro Handle and PYXIS Pro Grip transform Blackmagic PYXIS into a run and gun camera for broadcast and documentary work! Includes viewfinder, microphone, record/stop buttons and more! From US$119. Learn more at http://bmd.link/gmPqiE

Introducing Cintel Scanner G3 HDR+ 8/16! A new scanner designed specifically for 8mm and 16mm film, featuring a new optical assembly that allows you to get up to 2.5 higher resolution scanning of these smaller formats. Learn more at http://bmd.link/HmYbqX

Introducing Blackmagic PYXIS Monitor! A new, versatile monitoring solution for Blackmagic PYXIS cameras with bright HDR touchscreen, camera control and multiple mounting points! Available soon from only $249. Learn more at http://bmd.link/uzTWr9

Introducing Blackmagic PYXIS 6K! A next generation digital film camera featuring a box or cube design that’s easy to rig. Features full frame 6K sensor, Blackmagic RAW and global media sync to Blackmagic Cloud. Available in June in 3 models with L-Mount, locking EF or PL mount.

New Blackmagic Cloud Store Max! High performance flash storage designed for the television industry, with up to 48TB capacity, fast 100G Ethernet, 4 x 10G Ethernet and Blackmagic Cloud sync! Learn more at http://bmd.link/4f3bHW

Introducing Blackmagic Media Player 10G! A new Thunderbolt capture and playback solution for live production with 12G-SDI capture, fill and key video, extended desktop, plus 10G Ethernet and monitoring! Learn more at http://bmd.link/3tUHVX

New Blackmagic Ethernet Switch 360P! World’s first Ethernet switch for the film and television industry with 10G Ethernet for SMPTE-2110 IP video and front panel routing! Available in July from US$2,895. Learn more at http://bmd.link/T9y9Hz

Introducing Blackmagic 2110 IP Converters! New family of affordable 2110-IP video converters for broadcast and live production with models for monitoring, cameras and presentations. Available in May from US$295. Learn more at http://bmd.link/UfstuH

New SmartView 4K G3! The world’s first rack mount monitor with 2110 IP and 12G-SDI connections for SD, HD and Ultra HD up to 2160p60, 4K resolution LCD with focus peaking, framing guides, 3D LUTs and more! Available in May for US$1,265. Learn more at http://bmd.link/mCx3o9

New Blackmagic Audio Monitor 12G G3! Get powerful audio monitoring in an incredibly compact 1 rack unit size with accurate audio meters,12G-SDI and SMPTE 2110 IP video! Available in May from US$1,295. Learn more at http://bmd.link/qM7Mfv

Introducing Blackmagic Videohub 120x120 12G! New massive 120x120 video router with zero latency and multirate 12G-SDI connections for any combination of SD, HD and Ultra HD on the same router at the same time! Learn more at http://bmd.link/xzfmds

Introducing Blackmagic Media Dock! Now you can mount and share media over your network from Blackmagic URSA Cine camera media modules. Includes Blackmagic Cloud sync! Available now for US$1,995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/7PiPtU

Introducing Blackmagic Cloud Store Mini 16TB. A new 16TB model of our popular rack mount network storage with 10G Ethernet, Dropbox and Google Drive sync, 16TB of flash memory and HDMI monitoring! Available now for US$2,995. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagiccloudstoremini

New Blackmagic Cinema Camera 6K! Next generation digital film camera with 6K full frame sensor with OLPF, L-Mount, CFexpress media, plus simultaneous Blackmagic RAW and H.264 proxy recording for cloud workflows! Only US$2,595! Learn more at http://bmd.link/jbwbhw

Introducing Blackmagic Camera! Get high end digital film camera controls on your iPhone! Adjust settings such as frame rate, shutter angle, white balance and ISO, then upload footage to DaVinci editors worldwide! Available from Apple App Store, free of charge.

Introducing Blackmagic Studio Camera 4K Plus G2! An updated studio camera 4K model that adds 12G-SDI and remote camera control via REST APIs for improved broadcast workflows! Learn more at http://bmd.link/4V79ek

New Blackmagic Micro Studio Camera 4K G2! The world’s smallest Ultra HD broadcast camera with 12G-SDI, upgraded 4K digital film sensor, cinematic color science, Blackmagic RAW recording and more! Available October for only US$995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/yuXYHi

Introducing Blackmagic Videohub 80x80 12G! New zero latency 80x80 12G-SDI router with built in control panel, LCD for labels and live video monitoring, and spin knob for browsing sources! Available November for US$9,995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/4RtKmf

model: Introducing Blackmagic URSA Mini Pro 12K OLPF!

summary: New Blackmagic Videohub 12G! Introducing a new family of zero latency 12G-SDI routers featuring a built in control panel, an LCD for labels and live video monitoring, and a spin knob for browsing sources! Available now from US$1,395 Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagicvideohub

New lower prices for Blackmagic Cloud Store! More affordable prices make it easier to share media files globally. Blackmagic Cloud Store Mini 8TB is now US$2,355, Blackmagic Cloud Store 20TB is now US$7,595 and Blackmagic Cloud Store 80TB is now $22,995.
Blackmagic Converters 7.6.2 Update. Get improved handling of LUTs on all Micro Converter 12G models when working with full range video. Download now from http://bmd.link/fVoNFK

Introducing 4 new Ultimatte 12 models! A new family of legendary Ultimatte 12 keyers that allow you to build photorealistic composites and virtual sets at a more affordable price! Available now from US$495. Learn more at https://www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/ultimatte

model: Cloud now available in Australia, New Zealand and Singapore!
summary: Blackmagic Cloud now available in Australia, New Zealand and Singapore! Host your own project library to collaborate with others on the same project, at the same time, anywhere in the world. Learn more at https://www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/davinciresolve/collaboration
source_title: Blackmagic Cloud now available in Australia, New Zealand and Singapore!

summary: New Blackmagic Cloud Store Mini. Fast and compact rack mount network storage, 10G Ethernet, Dropbox sync, 8 TB of flash memory and HDMI monitoring! Available now for US$2,995. Learn more at http://bmd.link/pWge9c

New Desktop Video 12.2.1 Update. This update fixes occasional video playback and capture issues on M1 Pro and M1 Max powered Macs when working with DeckLink, UltraStudio and Intensity Pro models. Download now from http://bmd.link/9k7pX9

Introducing Blackmagic URSA Broadcast G2! The world’s most flexible broadcast camera with 6K sensor, dual gain ISO, H.265, Blackmagic RAW and more! Available now for US$3,995. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagicursabroadcast

New HyperDeck Studio! Powerful new models let you record and playback broadcast quality H.264, ProRes and DNx files with either PCM or AAC audio using SD cards or SSD media! Available now from US$495. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/hyperdeckstudio

Fusion Studio 17 now shipping! Get new Fusion effects templates, shape nodes, animation curves and improved optical flow as well as 3rd party workflow integration and more! Download from http://bmd.link/rH3sf3

model: Introducing Blackmagic Pocket Cinema Camera 6K Pro!
summary: Introducing Blackmagic Pocket Cinema Camera 6K Pro! A professional 6K digital film camera built in ND filters, adjustable HDR screen, generation 5 color science, larger battery and optional viewfinder! Available now for US$2,495. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagicpocketcinemacamera
source_title: Introducing Blackmagic Pocket Cinema Camera 6K Pro!

summary: New Blackmagic Web Presenter HD! Live stream from any 12G‑SDI video source direct to YouTube, Facebook, Twitter and more! Available now for US$495. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/blackmagicwebpresenter

New Fairlight Desktop Console! A portable audio control surface that includes 12 touch sensitive flying faders, channel LCDs for advanced processing, automation and transport controls plus HDMI for an external graphics display. Learn more at www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/davinciresolve/consoles

New UltraStudio 3G for Thunderbolt 3! UltraStudio Monitor 3G and UltraStudio Recorder 3G are the world’s smallest 3G-SDI and HDMI video connections for Thunderbolt 3 computers and can be operated from a computer’s battery or power source. Available now for US $115.

model: Videohub Master Control Pro and Videohub Smart Control Pro
summary: New Videohub Hardware Control Panels! Next generation Videohub router hardware control panels feature an elegant machined metal design plus new RGB buttons, power over Ethernet, AC power connection and more! Only US$695

summary: New DeckLink Quad HDMI Recorder! A PCIe capture card with 4 completely independent HDMI 2.0b input connections for simultaneously capturing any combination of SD, HD, Ultra HD, 4K DCI and even computer video, so it’s like getting 4 capture cards in one! http://bmd.link/cn/T9MdaA

Blackmagic Duplicator 4K 1.2 update adds new long form recording features that allow you to record non-stop for weeks with a single set of SD cards! Also included are multiple updates to file compatibility with third part software. Download now from http://bmd.link/c9MX9h!
New MultiView 2.1.1 Update. This update fixes a rare bug for which overlays do not appear on the output of MultiView 16. Download now.
New HyperDeck Studio 12G lower price! Advanced SSD broadcast deck with 12G-SDI for recording and playing back up to 2160p60! Now only $1,495!
